message:
test(conformance): add negative tests and performance bounds

Add comprehensive negative testing and performance bounds to conformance suite:

- 14 negative tests covering invalid usage patterns:
  - NEG-RG: Region operations (double-close, closed spawn, orphan tasks)
  - NEG-CH: Channel operations (closed send/recv, double-close, capacity overflow)
  - NEG-BD: Budget operations (zero budget spawns, exhausted poll quota)
  - NEG-TM: Time operations (zero timeout, negative duration, timer in closed region)

- 5 performance bounds tests:
  - PERF-001: Task spawn latency (<100μs)
  - PERF-002: Channel throughput (>100K msg/s)
  - PERF-003: Cancellation propagation (<1ms for 1000 tasks)
  - PERF-004: Region close latency (<10ms for 100 tasks)
  - PERF-005: Memory overhead (<1KB per task)

All tests include spec traceability tags (spec:3.1.1, spec:3.2.1, etc.)

Closes: asupersync-8n45

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
